subcodes.title: Words spoken at Rue Lauriston 97 in Paris, 1913-05-30
subcodes.first_line: One must eat in moderation. Man is not created for food. He must not indulge in eating too much. Overeating is the cause of many diseases.
subcodes.subjects: @transcending the material condition, @two aspects of the human soul; the higher and lower natures, @moderation; frugality; simplicity, @knowledge; recognition of God, @love of God, @education and the development of capacity
